question: Naturally, our company utilizes the production process ______ guarantees the most satisfactory results.
Rexington Engineering has recently set up an entire new research ______ because of the increasing interest in robotic technology.
Please place your luggage in the overhead locker, and ensure that the locker is closed ______.
An independent investigator ______ a report on the company's financial operations which, for some unknown reason, was never released.
The Department of Social Welfare's report this year indicated that it is focusing ______ on the homeless and long-term unemployed.
After a highly profitable first six months, the restaurant's profits for the second half of the year were a great ______.

Ms. Julie Kennedy and her innovative marketing team have gained renown for creating ______ products for struggling companies.
All drivers are required to maintain ______ logbooks accurately and to hand them in to the central office before leaving on Friday night.
According to the sign posted in front of the main office, the repair center is now ______ new management.
The unexpected surge in the prices of steel and other minerals will result in a dramatic increase in tax ______ this year.
The new head of marketing is already making his mark on the company even though he only ______ 6 weeks ago.
The chief financial officer believes that we should maintain the present course, and ______ his deputy.

As of October 1, Carla Fishermen will ______ the company as its interface in all dealings with the local government.
Health inspections are conducted ______ at restaurants throughout the province for the purpose of maintaining high standards of hygiene.
Because there were too many participants at the seminar, we should ______ smaller groups for discussion.
This is an excellent time to consider changing jobs because of the large number of positions ______ available in the mining sector.
The Department of the Environment supports the replacement of introduced plants with ______ plants that require much less watering.
While we still take telephone calls, other ______ of correspondence are encouraged to avoid tying up telephone lines unnecessarily.
Several exciting new pieces of equipment ______ in our gymnasium, and we invite you to come and try them out at no cost during the next week.
The giant pharmaceutical company insists that its new drug is ______ safe as long as it is used under the supervision of a doctor.
ABC Shoe Store asked ______ to make their final selections and bring them to cashiers' stations within 30 minutes.
To gain access to confidential company documents, employees require ______ from the operations manager.
It is true that the number of traffic accidents involving cyclists has increased ______ over the last 10 years.
Company strategists ______ predicted that conditions in the Middle East would eventually stabilize and result in expanded sales.
A light and healthy lunch followed by some exercise will make workers ______ more productive in the afternoon.
Although he did not perform ______ well as a student, he went on to become one of the most respected scholars in his field.
As you would expect at one of the world's most reputable hotels, the ______ is prompt, efficient, and discreet.
A small group of contestants has been selected following a nationwide search ______ over the last six months.
______ wanting to apply for maternity leave should let their immediate supervisor know about their plans at least one month in advance.
The director ______ has often been seen to take his lunch in the staff canteen along with the other workers.
The budget to be released later this week will ______ reduce spending on employee facilities such as the sports center.
______ the recent sales campaign was not as successful as we had expected, our new range of goods has been well reviewed by consumer groups.
______ in computer technology have allowed technicians to perform multi-dimensional graphics far better than ever before.
The upcoming convention invites ______ from anyone working or having research interests in the field.
______ leaving school, she has worked in a variety of positions but has not yet found one which suits her talents or interests.
______ good evaluations from their immediate bosses should be the main objective of those who wish to be promoted this year.
______ you have familiarized yourself with the basic commands, we can begin to learn some of this program's more creative features.
Although the ______ for the best design will be very fierce, Mr. Gozalas has a good chance of getting the award.
Would the person ______ muddy jogging clothes were found in the staff shower room please claim them at the lost and found office?
Even professional marketers are never sure ______ some new products are runaway successes while others fail miserably.
The Security Department has warned that any ______ use of the car park on weekends will result in the vehicle being towed.
A new strategic plan ______ increasing productivity was introduced at the last meeting of the board of directors.
